About Organization

The Institute Of Engineering And Rural Technology is a government-funded institution that provides diploma courses in various fields.

The institution is located in Prayagraj and offers admissions to eligible students through the IERT Entrance Exam.

About the Programme

The IERT Entrance Exam is conducted to provide admissions to various diploma courses offered by the Institute Of Engineering And Rural Technology.

The exam is open to class 10 and 12 passed students who meet the eligibility criteria.

CareerFlora Expert Insight

The IERT Entrance Exam 2026 is a great opportunity for students who want to pursue diploma courses in various fields. The exam is conducted by the Institute Of Engineering And Rural Technology and provides admissions to eligible students.

The eligibility criteria for the exam are class 10 and 12 passed students who meet the eligibility criteria as per the institution's rules. The required documents for the exam include class 10 and 12 mark sheets, identity proof, address proof, photograph, and signature.
